case_title: AUTOVEST LLC VS. PATRICK STROMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200018519), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC SERVED OCT-19-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, PATRICK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $299.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200031488) AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, PATRICK
DECLARATION RE: 1788 (TRANSACTION ID # 200031488) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007645) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-02-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-04-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STROMAN, PATRICK $8,202.35 PRINCIPAL, $299.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,502.25, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-14-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 200025893) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $2,161.82 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 210082891) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, PATRICK DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2020
DECLARATION RE: FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200031488) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200031488) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, PATRICK
